title: Global shares sink for CareSuper in first quarter

summary: Global shares have declined significantly in the first quarter, impacting superannuation funds like CareSuper. This downturn follows a period of strong performance, with geopolitical tensions, particularly in the Middle East, contributing to the market shift. The situation raises concerns about the sustainability of super fund returns amidst ongoing global uncertainties.
publication:
Chalmers talks a big game - it's time to act on intergenerational fairness
The Age02 May 20261,330 wordsMillie Muroi

When we debate intergenerational fairness, it often looks like younger Australians lamenting the selfishness of Boomers and those Boomers calling Zoomers "entitled" for wanting more.
heading: Superannuation and Investments
key_points: Global shares have declined, affecting super funds' performance
Geopolitical tensions are influencing market conditions
Concerns about the sustainability of super fund returns are growing
relevance: Understanding market fluctuations and their impact on superannuation funds is crucial for actuaries and financial services professionals in managing risk and advising clients.
